title: encyclia ortgiesii
intro: Encyclia ortgiesii, also known as the Dime Show Orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is a terrestrial orchid native to Mexico, known for its distinctive white and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, and is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Encyclia ortgiesii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically made from the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots.
